title: THE HOSPITAL BLACKOUT
description: A power failure has disabled part of the city's largest hospital. The emergency generators are running, but engineers warn that they may fail within six hours.

choices.text: Redirect emergency funds to repair the hospital immediately.
choices.outcome: The repairs begin within the hour. The hospital remains operational, but several planned road repairs are cancelled.

choices.text: Ask private businesses to provide emergency generators.
choices.outcome: Several companies agree to help, but they now expect favourable treatment from your administration.

choices.text: Evacuate patients to smaller hospitals across the city.
choices.outcome: The evacuation prevents a total disaster, but the transport system struggles and several districts lose ambulance coverage.
